mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_medicine um JOIN ( SELECT CURDATE() AS target_date UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY) UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 4 DAY) UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 DAY) UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) ) d WHERE um.user_id = #{userId} AND um.status != '중단' AND d.target_date BETWEEN um.start_date AND um.end_date
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT medicine_id, taken_date) FROM medicine_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND taken_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND CURDATE() AND status = '복용완료'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_medicine um JOIN ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL n DAY) AS target_date FROM ( SELECT 0 n UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 UNION ALL SELECT 11 UNION ALL SELECT 12 UNION ALL SELECT 13 UNION ALL SELECT 14 UNION ALL SELECT 15 UNION ALL SELECT 16 UNION ALL SELECT 17 UNION ALL SELECT 18 UNION ALL SELECT 19 UNION ALL SELECT 20 UNION ALL SELECT 21 UNION ALL SELECT 22 UNION ALL SELECT 23 UNION ALL SELECT 24 UNION ALL SELECT 25 UNION ALL SELECT 26 UNION ALL SELECT 27 UNION ALL SELECT 28 UNION ALL SELECT 29 ) nums ) d WHERE um.user_id = #{userId} AND um.status != '중단' AND d.target_date BETWEEN um.start_date AND um.end_date
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT medicine_id, taken_date) FROM medicine_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND taken_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY) AND CURDATE() AND status = '복용완료'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_medicine WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != '중단' AND #{date} BETWEEN start_date AND end_date

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, item_seq AS itemSeq, item_name AS itemName, DATE_FORMAT(start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate, daily_count AS dailyCount, dose_time AS doseTime, status, memo, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM user_medicine WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != '중단' AND status != '삭제됨' AND CURDATE() BETWEEN start_date AND end_date

SELECT um.id AS medicineId, um.dose_time AS time, um.item_name AS itemName, CASE WHEN ml.id IS NOT NULL THEN '완료' ELSE '예정' END AS status FROM user_medicine um LEFT JOIN medicine_log ml ON um.id = ml.medicine_id AND ml.user_id = #{userId} AND ml.taken_date = CURDATE() AND ml.status = '복용완료' WHERE um.user_id = #{userId} AND um.status != '중단' AND um.status != '삭제됨' AND CURDATE() BETWEEN um.start_date AND um.end_date ORDER BY um.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT medicine_id) FROM medicine_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND taken_date = CURDATE() AND status = '복용완료'
